topic: Official Document MedicalGold.pdf  Plan Year 2024 Plan Name 2024 Premera Gold Medical PPO
content:

一 | The individual deductible for the 2024Gold Medical Plan is $500.
The family deductible for the 2024 Gold Medical Plan is $1,000.
